summary: Update mode: Full regression testing completed successfully. ALL tests pass - 130/130 backend tests (100%) and 152/152 frontend tests (100%). The BITZ Club membership management application is fully functional: Registration Flow (Step 1 Lead Capture → Step 2 Plan Selection → Razorpay Payment) → Login (Mobile/Member ID) → Member Dashboard (with 6 tabs) → Membership Card (with QR code). Admin dashboard and all CRUD operations working.
seed_data_creation: None - using existing test credentials: member 7777777777/member123, admin 9999999999/admin123
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests pass. Test credentials: member 7777777777/member123, admin 9999999999/admin123. Fixed several spec files that had incorrect passwords (was PWAtest123! should be member123). Fixed PIN code auto-fill test timing for external India Post API. Fixed admin-plans test to wait for API response before checking plan count. Fixed modal-overlay and mobile-responsiveness tests that were looking for non-existent data-testid='membership-card'. All major flows verified working: Registration Step 1 & 2, Razorpay payment initiation, Login (mobile/member ID/admin), Member dashboard with all 6 tabs, Membership card with QR code, Admin dashboard with all sections.

features_verified.member_dashboard: WORKING - All 6 tabs functional (My Card, My Profile, Refer & Earn, Affiliations, Bookings, Payments, Feedback)

features_verified.admin_dashboard: WORKING - All sections accessible: Members, Leads, Payments, Plans, Coupons, Maintenance, Affiliations, Telecallers, Reports
